## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `test` — Tests added/updated
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change with no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation
- [ ] `chore` — Build, deps, config

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm -r test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm -r lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`pnpm -r typecheck`)
- [ ] D&D rules verified against PHB 2024 / SRD (if rules change)
- [ ] Reviewed by `qa-playtester` agent (for rules-engine and backend PRs)
- [ ] Screenshots attached (for UI changes)
- [ ] Mobile tested (for frontend changes)
